name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: At 646 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ, Western Union Money Order Only delivers 24-hour money order and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 646 W Indian School Rd in Phoenix, AZ operates as a dedicated money order and check-cashing service available 24 hours every day. This Phoenix location provides immediate access to financial services for residents who need them outside traditional banking hours.

At this Phoenix location, you can send money orders, deposit or cash checks, and handle other quick money transfer needs. For specific service details or questions about what's available at the 646 W Indian School Rd site, call 602-279-4998.

When visiting Western Union Money Order Only on Indian School Rd in Phoenix, bring a valid photo ID and have your payment information ready. This 24/7 service is perfect for Phoenix residents and visitors who need fast, reliable money transfer or check-cashing options at any time of day.
address: 646 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85013

company_info.headquarters: 646 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85013

pros: Extensive agent network with hundreds of locations at Walmart, grocery chains, retail stores, and bank partners nationwide
Money orders available as trusted alternative to checks for sending cash securely
Same-day or next-day cash pickup at participating locations with MTCN tracking
Online/app registration option allows customers to start transfers before visiting location, saving counter time
Multiple payment methods accepted including cash, debit, and credit cards at select locations
First online international money transfer is fee-free
Services available 24/7 at some locations (hours vary by agent location)
Encryption and fraud prevention protections for money transfers
cons: No in-person currency exchange services available at agent locations
Pricing and fees vary significantly by transfer method, payment option, and destination—no transparent posted rates
Known processing delays on certain international routes (currently experiencing delays for Cameroon Orange Wallet payments)
Service hours vary by location, requiring individual lookup before visiting
Not all locations accept credit card payments; cash and debit are more universally accepted
best_for: Customers needing to send or receive domestic cash quickly without a bank account
People sending money internationally who want in-person transaction verification
Those preferring money orders as a secure alternative to checks for bill payment or cash transfer
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing quick in-person cash transfers or money orders, particularly those without traditional bank accounts who value the security of a physical location and tracking number. The main caveat is that fees and rates are not transparently posted online and vary significantly by transfer type and destination—customers must use their calculator or visit a location for accurate pricing.
services: Domestic and international in-person money transfers
Bill payment (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Cash pickup for funds sent by others using MTCN
Prepaid Visa card option for receiving money
Online and app-based transfer registration with in-person cash payment
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) tracking for transfers
Service at retail and grocery store locations
Debit and cash payment options at agent locations
meta_description: Phoenix, AZ Western Union Money Order Only at 646 W Indian School Rd offers 24-hour money orders and check cashing.
